About
ICICI Prudential Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth
ICICI Prudential Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Ashwini Jemin Bharucha is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹11,18,142 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 06 Jul 2026 is ₹35.29.
The ICICI Prudential Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% If redeemed within 15 days.
;
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks a fund of fund scheme with the primary objective to generate returns by investing in units of ICICI Prudential Silver ETF.
